hook: Choose: two-factor authentication mistakes everyone makes.

script_segments.text: Choose: two-factor authentication mistakes everyone makes.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing two-factor authentication mistakes everyone makes. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: I'm going right. Every time. But that's just me — comment yours.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: Talking about two-factor authentication mistakes everyone makes because someone needed to say it. Agree or disagree?
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
